sqlMap.select: /*PledgeReport1.selectPledgeInfoExcelList*/ SELECT T.PLEDGE_INFO_ID || '_' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_ID , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AS PLEDGE_INFO_ID , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO_NM , A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD AS PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD , A.PLEDGE_END_YMD AS PLEDGE_END_YMD , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , T.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL AS PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL AS PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL FROM (SELECT A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ A , (SELECT BB.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId# AND BB.DEL_YN = 'N' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = B.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID START WITH A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = '00000000000' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) T , TB_PLEDGEINFO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID
